headline: Why Is ServiceNow (NOW) Stock Rocketing Higher Today
summary: Shares of enterprise workflow automation company ServiceNow (NYSE:NOW) jumped 7.7% in the afternoon session after markets benefited from a "risk-on" sentiment fueled by potential peace negotiations between the U.S. and Iran.

headline: California Approves First AI Registered Apprenticeship as Creating Coding Careers Secures Dual Federal-State Recognition Across Nine Tech Occupations
summary: Employers hiring through Creating Coding Careers (CCC) can now access California state apprenticeship funding, and every apprentice who completes the program will earn a credential recognized by both the federal government and the State of California. The California Division of Apprenticeship Standards (CA DAS) has granted official approval of CCC's Registered Apprenticeship Program across nine new-collar technology occupations, completing dual federal-state recognition for the San Diego-based n

headline: ServiceNow vs Shopify: Which Is the Better Short Candidate Right Now?
summary: ServiceNow (NYSE: NOW) and Shopify (NASDAQ: SHOP) are both high-multiple technology names, but which one carries the more compelling short thesis right now? headline: ComplianceCow Announces Integration with ServiceNow Integrated Risk Management to Automate Continuous Control Monitoring for Enterprises
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, April 16, 2026--ComplianceCow today announced an integration with ServiceNow, the AI control tower for business reinvention, to offer automated, continuous evidence collection, controls testing, remediation and graph analysis for IT and cybersecurity controls.

content.title: ComplianceCow Announces Integration with ServiceNow Integrated Risk Management to Automate Continuous Control Monitoring for Enterprises
content.summary: SAN FRANCISCO, April 16, 2026--ComplianceCow today announced an integration with ServiceNow, the AI control tower for business reinvention, to offer automated, continuous evidence collection, controls testing, remediation and graph analysis for IT and cybersecurity controls.

thumbnail.caption: ComplianceCow sits between operational systems and ServiceNow IRM. ComplianceCow connects to cloud, identity, CI/CD, and on-prem systems, continuously verifies control behavior, maps evidence across frameworks, and sends verified evidence into ServiceNow IRM as the system of record.
